obiectiv.name: Java Basics
obiectiv.label: JavaBasics

obiectiv.name: Define the scope of variables
obiectiv.label: VarScope

obiectiv.name: Define the structure of Java Class
obiectiv.label: JavaClassStructure

obiectiv.name: Create executable Java applications with a main method; run a Java program from the command line, including console output
obiectiv.label: JavaClassStructure

obiectiv.name: Import other Java packages to make them accessible in your code
obiectiv.label: JavaPackages

obiectiv.name: Compare and contrast the features and components of Java, such as platform independence, object orientation, encapsulation, and so on
obiectiv.label: JavaFeatures

obiectiv.name: Working With Java Data Types
obiectiv.label: JavaDataTypes

obiectiv.name: Declare and initialize variables (including casting of primitive data types)
obiectiv.label: VarDeclarInit

obiectiv.name: Differentiate between object reference variables and primitive variables
obiectiv.label: ObjRefVarAndPrimitives

obiectiv.name: Know how to read or write to object fields
obiectiv.label: ReadWriteObjFields

obiectiv.name: Using Operators and Decision Constructs
obiectiv.label: OperatorsAndDecisions

obiectiv.name: Use Java operators; use parentheses to override operator precedence
obiectiv.label: JavaOperators

obiectiv.name: Test equality between Strings and other objects using == and equals()
obiectiv.label: TestStringsEquals

obiectiv.name: Create if and if/else and ternary constructs
obiectiv.label: IfElseConstructs

obiectiv.name: Use a switch statement
obiectiv.label: SwitchStatement

obiectiv.name: Creating and Using Arrays
obiectiv.label: CreateUsingArrays

obiectiv.name: Declare, instantiate, initialize and use a one-dimensional array
obiectiv.label: Array

obiectiv.name: Declare, instantiate, initialize and use multi-dimensional arrays
obiectiv.label: Arrays

obiectiv.name: Using Loop Constructs
obiectiv.label: LoopConstructs

obiectiv.name: Create and use while loops
obiectiv.label: WhileLoops

obiectiv.name: Create and use for loops including the enhanced for loop
obiectiv.label: ForLoops

obiectiv.name: Create and use do/while loops
obiectiv.label: DoWhileLoops

obiectiv.name: Compare loop constructs
obiectiv.label: CompareLoop

obiectiv.name: Use break and continue
obiectiv.label: BreakContinue

obiectiv.name: Working with Methods and Encapsulation
obiectiv.label: MethodsEncapsulation

obiectiv.name: Create methods with arguments and return values; including overloaded methods
obiectiv.label: CreateMethods

obiectiv.name: Apply the static keyword to methods and fields
obiectiv.label: Static

obiectiv.name: Create and overload constructors; differentiate between default and user defined constructors
obiectiv.label: Constructors

obiectiv.name: Apply access modifiers
obiectiv.label: AccessModifiers

obiectiv.name: Apply encapsulation principles to a class
obiectiv.label: Encapsulation

obiectiv.name: Determine the effect upon object references and primitive values when they are passed into methods that change the values
obiectiv.label: ObjectReferences

obiectiv.name: Working with Inheritance
obiectiv.label: Inheritance

obiectiv.name: Describe inheritance and its benefits
obiectiv.label: DescribeInheritance

obiectiv.name: Develop code that makes use of polymorphism; develop code that overrides methods; differentiate between the type of a reference and the type of an object
obiectiv.label: Code

obiectiv.name: Determine when casting is necessary
obiectiv.label: Casting

obiectiv.name: Use super and this to access objects and constructors
obiectiv.label: SuperAndThis

obiectiv.name: Use abstract classes and interfaces
obiectiv.label: AbstractClassesAndInterfaces

obiectiv.name: Handling Exceptions
obiectiv.label: Exceptions

obiectiv.name: Differentiate among checked exceptions, unchecked exceptions, and Errors
obiectiv.label: DifferentiateAmongExceptionsErrors

obiectiv.name: Create a try-catch block and determine how exceptions alter normal program flow
obiectiv.label: TryCatch

obiectiv.name: Describe the advantages of Exception handling
obiectiv.label: ExceptionHandling

obiectiv.name: Create and invoke a method that throws an exception
obiectiv.label: CreateInvokeException

obiectiv.name: Recognize common exception classes (such as NullPointerException, ArithmeticException, ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException, ClassCastException)
obiectiv.label: RecognizeExceptionClasses

obiectiv.name: Working with Selected classes from the Java API
obiectiv.label: JavaAPI

obiectiv.name: Manipulate data using the StringBuilder class and its methods
obiectiv.label: ManipulateDataUsingStringBuilder

obiectiv.name: Create and manipulate Strings
obiectiv.label: CreateManipulateStrings

obiectiv.name: Create and manipulate calendar data using classes from java.time.LocalDateTime, java.time.LocalDate, java.time.LocalTime, java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter, java.time.Period
obiectiv.label: CreateManipulateCalendarData

obiectiv.name: Declare and use an ArrayList of a given type
obiectiv.label: DeclareUseArrayList

obiectiv.name: Write a simple Lambda expression that consumes a Lambda Predicate expression
obiectiv.label: LambdaExpression
